name: capacity_lookup
description: Looks up open dispatch capacity for a ServiceTitan business unit during a stated arrival window. Use BEFORE offering a customer a specific time slot. Returns a list of bookable {start,end} pairs or status='empty' when nothing is available. Results cache 5 minutes server-side to flatten repeat lookups during a single dispatch conversation.

business_unit_id.description: ServiceTitan business unit id (e.g. 1001 for HVAC residential). Maps 1-to-1 to ST /dispatch capacity request.

arrival_window.description: Arrival window the caller agreed on, formatted as 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM-HH:MM' (e.g. '2026-05-02 13:00-15:00') or any free-form window tag. Used as the cache key suffix and passed verbatim to ST.

_notes: STUB FOR REVIEW — Luke must register this in the Retell agent flow. Do not point at taylor-ai (Retell rule).
No 'name' parameter (collides with Retell internals — see qsc-infra/.claude/rules/retell.md).
Returns 200 even on error; flow branches on .status.
